channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 281928aa-9782-4d9a-954a-3f34c1ed9f95
Display name: Container Registry Connected Registry Administrator
Description: Can manage connected registries in a container registry, including the scope maps and tokens required to provision and operate them.
Link: https://management.azure.com/281928aa-9782-4d9a-954a-3f34c1ed9f95?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 93f83a62-9a8b-4821-9827-5b3ee513aec3
Display name: Container Registry Connected Registry Reader
Description: Can view connected registries and their associated scope maps and tokens in a container registry.
Link: https://management.azure.com/93f83a62-9a8b-4821-9827-5b3ee513aec3?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: c8a487a2-c85b-4487-83a1-9f04cde10293
Display name: Storage File Backup Contributor
Description: Lets you perform file share backup operations using Azure Backup on the storage account
Link: https://management.azure.com/c8a487a2-c85b-4487-83a1-9f04cde10293?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: e7a9e73d-4397-41f2-a282-af8b65aaa2dc
Display name: Storage File Restore Contributor
Description: Lets you perform file share restore operations using Azure Backup on the storage account
Link: https://management.azure.com/e7a9e73d-4397-41f2-a282-af8b65aaa2dc?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 470229df-a15a-4b08-9d95-8c534862b362
Display name: Calendars.Read.All
Description: Read all users' work hours and locations
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/470229df-a15a-4b08-9d95-8c534862b362

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: d91697b0-a708-4c11-a712-8fb2dc081aa2
Display name: Calendars.ReadWrite.All
Description: Read and write all users' work hours and locations
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/d91697b0-a708-4c11-a712-8fb2dc081aa2

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 050b0d28-840a-4ff6-bdf9-cc6221acbc1f
Display name: Calls.ReportSyntheticMedia.All
Description: Report synthetic media detections in calls
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/050b0d28-840a-4ff6-bdf9-cc6221acbc1f

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: b328f35f-712c-40d6-b6b4-95449d77b352
Display name: CaseManagement.Read.All
Description: Read all cases, relations, tasks, attachments and activities
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/b328f35f-712c-40d6-b6b4-95449d77b352

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 57ac77a0-bb98-4ba8-bf9a-7af06dcdcc1f
Display name: CaseManagement.ReadWrite.All
Description: Read and write to all cases, relations, tasks, attachments and activities
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/57ac77a0-bb98-4ba8-bf9a-7af06dcdcc1f

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 1583d471-fede-4e7c-b062-57e9d60cfb49
Display name: MailboxItem.ReadWrite.All
Description: Read and write all users' mailbox items
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/1583d471-fede-4e7c-b062-57e9d60cfb49
